preview: Create System Test document for Meeting Room Management System

values:
1. Web Portal: https://portal.nextform.vn/session/signin
2. Mobile App: Cypresscom meeting (Android / iOS)
3. Web Browser: Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge (latest version)
4. Meeting Room Manager account: thuky / @Nextformvn2024@
5. Participant accounts: daibieu1@tempmail.id.vn, daibieu2@tempmail.id.vn, daibieu3@tempmail.id.vn / @Nextformvn2024@
6. Android Tablet (Display App) at meeting room entrance (if available)
7. Stable Internet connection
Verify meeting booking functionality for User on Web/App
User is logged into the system
Verify approve/reject booking request workflow for Meeting Room Manager
There is a booking request in pending status
Verify copying information from an old meeting to create a new booking
User has at least one previous meeting
Verify Display App shows meeting room status at the room entrance
Display App tablet is connected and assigned to the meeting room
Verify 15-minute end warning notification and meeting extension workflow
Meeting is approved and currently in progress
Verify system sends reminders every 5 minutes when meeting exceeds scheduled time
Meeting has ended but not confirmed as ended/extended
Verify meeting hours statistics report by room/unit
Meeting Room Manager is logged into Web
Verify export daily meeting schedule to PDF/Excel
Meeting Room Manager is logged into Web
Verify overlapping slot validation and approved meeting room change workflow
Approved meeting/available equivalent room data exists
Verify tablet reconnect behavior and logistics preparation confirmation
Display App and logistics account are available
Verify attendance API update and advanced report filters
Attendance API and report sample data are available

values: Verify meeting registration, approve/reject request, and copy meeting functions per SRS sections 3.1 and 4.2
Verify meeting room list and available slots are displayed in real time

1. Log in to Web https://portal.nextform.vn with daibieu1@tempmail.id.vn
2. Navigate to meeting booking
3. Select date/time for booking
4. Observe room list and slot availability
System displays room list with capacity, equipment, and real-time available/busy status
User is successfully logged into Web Portal
Verify successful meeting registration with all required fields

1. Log in with daibieu1@tempmail.id.vn
2. Select a room with available slot
3. Enter Meeting Name, Time, Chairperson, Secretary, Content, Number of Participants
4. Click Submit Request
Request is created successfully with Pending Approval status; Manager receives notification
Selected room has available slot at chosen time
Verify validation when required fields are missing

1. Log in with daibieu1@tempmail.id.vn
2. Open registration form, leave required fields empty
3. Click Submit Request
System shows error message and prevents submission when required fields are missing
Verify Manager approves a booking request

1. Log in with thuky
2. Open pending request list
3. Select a valid request
4. Click Approve
Request status changes to Approved; Email/App notifications are sent to participants
There is a booking request in pending status
Verify Manager rejects a booking request

1. Log in with thuky
2. Select a pending request
3. Click Reject and enter reason
Request status changes to Rejected; User receives notification
There is a booking request in pending status
Verify Manager cancels an approved meeting (emergency coordination)

1. Log in with thuky
2. Open an approved meeting
3. Click Cancel/Reschedule and enter reason
Meeting is cancelled/rescheduled; notifications are sent to all related parties
Verify copying information from an old meeting

1. Log in with daibieu1@tempmail.id.vn
2. Select an old meeting, click Copy
3. Update date/time and Submit Request
Form is pre-filled with old meeting data; new request is submitted successfully
User has at least one previous meeting
Verify document attachment when registering a meeting

1. Log in with daibieu1@tempmail.id.vn
2. Fill all required fields and upload a file
3. Submit Request
Document is uploaded successfully; booking request is created with attachment
User is logged in and has a valid file to upload
Verify system prevents booking when selected slot overlaps an approved meeting

1. Log in with daibieu1@tempmail.id.vn
2. Select a room and time slot that already has an approved meeting
3. Fill all required meeting information
4. Click Submit Request
System prevents submission and shows a conflict message; no new booking request is created for the overlapping slot
There is an approved meeting in the same room and time slot
Verify Manager changes meeting room after approval without changing approved meeting content

1. Log in with thuky
2. Open an approved meeting
3. Choose Change Room
4. Select an equivalent available room
5. Confirm change
Meeting room is updated; meeting name, chairperson, secretary, content, delegates and time remain unchanged; related users receive notification
There is an approved meeting and an equivalent room is available

values: Verify Display App, end warning, meeting extension, and auto reminder per SRS sections 3.2, 3.3 and 4.3
Verify Display App turns Red (Busy) when meeting starts

1. Create and approve a meeting for Room A
2. Wait until meeting start time
3. Observe tablet screen at Room A entrance
Screen turns Red and shows meeting name, chairperson, and current time
Display App is connected via WiFi and assigned to Room A
Verify Display App turns Green (Available) when room is empty

1. Ensure Room B has no ongoing meeting
2. Observe tablet screen at Room B entrance
Screen shows Green color with Available status
Display App is connected and assigned to Room B
Verify next meeting schedule is displayed on Display App

1. Book 2 consecutive meetings for the same room
2. During the first meeting, observe Display App
Display shows current meeting info and next meeting schedule for the room
Room has at least 2 approved consecutive meetings
Verify 15-minute end warning notification before meeting ends

1. Use an approved meeting currently in progress
2. Wait until 15 minutes before end time
3. Check App/Email notification for creator
System sends Do you want to extend? notification to Creator and Meeting Room Manager
Meeting is in progress with 15 minutes remaining

1. Receive 15-minute warning
2. User clicks Extend on App
3. Manager (thuky) logs in and approves extension
4. Verify next room slot
Extension is approved if next slot is free; meeting time is updated; notifications are sent
Meeting is in progress and next slot is available
Verify auto reminder every 5 minutes when meeting exceeds scheduled time

1. Let meeting end without End or Extend action
2. Observe App/Email notifications
3. Record interval between reminders
System sends reminder every 5 minutes until meeting is ended or extended
Meeting has ended but User has not confirmed end/extend
Verify multi-channel notifications (Email and Push) when meeting is approved

1. User (daibieu1) creates a booking request
2. Manager (thuky) approves the request
3. Check Email and App notifications for participants
Participants receive notifications via Email and Push notification on Cypresscom meeting App
Meeting was just approved; participants have App installed and valid email
Verify Display App reconnects and refreshes room status after WiFi interruption

1. Ensure tablet is showing current room status
2. Disconnect tablet WiFi for 1 minute
3. Reconnect WiFi
4. Observe displayed room status
Display App reconnects automatically and refreshes to the latest room status without manual reload
Display App tablet is assigned to a room and WebSocket/realtime service is available
Verify Logistics staff receives preparation task and confirms room setup

1. User creates a meeting with 20 delegates and nameplate requirement
2. Manager approves the meeting
3. Log in as logistics staff
4. Open preparation task
5. Mark preparation as completed
Logistics staff receives notification with room, time, delegate count and nameplate list; task status changes to Completed after confirmation
Meeting request includes logistics information and delegate nameplate list

1. Ensure Room B has no ongoing meeting
2. Observe tablet screen at Room B en...
Screen shows Green color with Available status
Display App is connected and assigned to Room B
Verify next meeting schedule is displayed on Display App

1. Book 2 consecutive meetings for the same room
2. During the first meeting,...
Display shows current meeting info and next meeting schedule for the room
Room has at least 2 approved consecutive meetings

values: Verify performance statistics, violation reports, and meeting list export per SRS sections 3.4 and 4.5
Verify meeting hours statistics by room/unit

1. Log in with thuky
2. Navigate to Reports & Statistics
3. Select time range (month/quarter)
4. Filter by room or unit
5. View chart/results
System displays room usage chart, meeting hours, and session count based on selected filters
Manager is logged in and system has meeting data

1. Log in with thuky
2. Navigate to Violation Report
3. Select time range
4. View violation list
System displays list of late meetings, room usage rate, and units/individuals with overtime meetings
System has historical meeting data including overtime cases
Verify export daily meeting schedule to PDF/Excel

1. Log in with thuky
2. Navigate to Daily Meeting List
3. Select date
4. Click Export PDF or Export Excel
PDF/Excel file is downloaded with full daily meeting schedule (name, room, time, chairperson)
Manager is logged in and there are meetings on selected date
Verify attendance API marks delegate as present after fingerprint/face recognition

1. Prepare an approved meeting with delegate list
2. Send attendance payload from fingerprint/face recognition system through API Gateway
3. Open meeting attendance list
Matched delegate is automatically marked as Present and attendance data is available for reporting
Attendance device/API payload contains a valid delegate identifier for the meeting
Verify report filter supports room, meeting type and chairperson conditions

1. Log in with thuky
2. Navigate to Reports & Statistics
3. Select a custom date range
4. Apply filters by room, meeting type and chairperson
5. View/export result
Report displays only meetings matching all selected filters; exported file keeps the same filtered data
System has meeting data across multiple rooms, meeting types and chairpersons
